record.field: Customer, order, salesperson, totals, and order line details.

{ "version": "1.0", "module": "dynamic_pdf_report_builder", "report": { "name": "Sales Order Template", "report_title": "Sales Order", "model": "sale.order", "styling": { "layout_style": "modern", "paper_size": "a4", "direction": "ltr", "primary_color": "#2563EB", "secondary_color": "#F8FAFC", "text_color": "#111827", "table_header_bg_color": "#2563EB", "table_header_text_color": "#FFFFFF", "border_color": "#CBD5E1", "font_size": 12, "title_font_size": 24, "show_company_logo": true, "show_company_name": true, "show_report_title": true, "show_footer": true, "footer_text": "Sales order generated by Dynamic PDF Report Builder", "show_print_date": true, "show_page_number": true, "table_border_style": "light", "zebra_rows": true, "template_preset": false } }, "fields": [ {"sequence": 10, "field_name": "partner_id", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 20, "field_name": "date_order", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 30, "field_name": "user_id", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 40, "field_name": "amount_total", "show_label": true} ], "line_sections": [ { "sequence": 10, "name": "Order Lines", "one2many_field_name": "order_line", "show_section_title": true, "line_fields": [ {"sequence": 10, "field_name": "product_id", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 20, "field_name": "product_uom_qty", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 30, "field_name": "price_unit", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 40, "field_name": "price_subtotal", "show_label": true} ] } ], "blocks": [ { "sequence": 10, "block_type": "note", "title": "Customer Note", "content": "

Please review ordered products, quantities, pricing, and delivery expectations before confirmation.

", "position": "after_main_table", "alignment": "left", "is_active": true, "source_type": "record_name" }, { "sequence": 20, "block_type": "signature", "title": "Approval", "position": "after_line_sections", "alignment": "right", "is_active": true, "source_type": "record_name", "signature_label": "Authorized Signature", "show_signature_line": true } ], "formulas": [ { "sequence": 10, "name": "Calculated Total", "code": "calculated_total", "scope": "main_record", "formula_type": "arithmetic", "active": true, "formula_expression": "amount_untaxed + amount_tax", "output_label": "Calculated Total", "show_in_report": true, "show_in_line_tables": true } ], "groups": [ {"sequence": 10, "field_name": "user_id"} ], "aggregates": [ {"field_name": "amount_total", "aggregate_type": "sum"} ] }
Invoice header details with product, tax, and subtotal columns.

{ "version": "1.0", "module": "dynamic_pdf_report_builder", "report": { "name": "Customer Invoice Template", "report_title": "Customer Invoice", "model": "account.move", "styling": { "layout_style": "classic", "paper_size": "a4", "direction": "ltr", "primary_color": "#0F766E", "secondary_color": "#ECFDF5", "text_color": "#111827", "table_header_bg_color": "#0F766E", "table_header_text_color": "#FFFFFF", "border_color": "#A7F3D0", "font_size": 12, "title_font_size": 24, "show_company_logo": true, "show_company_name": true, "show_report_title": true, "show_footer": true, "footer_text": "Invoice generated by Dynamic PDF Report Builder", "show_print_date": true, "show_page_number": true, "table_border_style": "solid", "zebra_rows": true, "template_preset": false } }, "fields": [ {"sequence": 10, "field_name": "partner_id", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 20, "field_name": "invoice_date", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 30, "field_name": "invoice_date_due", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 40, "field_name": "amount_total", "show_label": true} ], "line_sections": [ { "sequence": 10, "name": "Invoice Lines", "one2many_field_name": "invoice_line_ids", "show_section_title": true, "line_fields": [ {"sequence": 10, "field_name": "product_id", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 20, "field_name": "quantity", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 30, "field_name": "price_unit", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 40, "field_name": "tax_ids", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 50, "field_name": "price_subtotal", "show_label": true} ] } ], "blocks": [ { "sequence": 10, "block_type": "note", "title": "Payment Note", "content": "

Please pay this invoice by the due date shown above.

", "position": "after_main_table", "alignment": "left", "is_active": true, "source_type": "record_name" }, { "sequence": 20, "block_type": "qr_code", "title": "Invoice QR", "position": "after_line_sections", "alignment": "right", "is_active": true, "source_type": "record_name", "size": 110 } ], "formulas": [ { "sequence": 10, "name": "Calculated Total", "code": "calculated_total", "scope": "main_record", "formula_type": "arithmetic", "active": true, "formula_expression": "amount_untaxed + amount_tax", "output_label": "Calculated Total", "show_in_report": true, "show_in_line_tables": true } ], "groups": [ {"sequence": 10, "field_name": "partner_id"} ], "aggregates": [ {"field_name": "amount_total", "aggregate_type": "sum"} ] }
Vendor, buyer, order totals, and purchase order line details.

{ "version": "1.0", "module": "dynamic_pdf_report_builder", "report": { "name": "Purchase Order Template", "report_title": "Purchase Order", "model": "purchase.order", "styling": { "layout_style": "classic", "paper_size": "a4", "direction": "ltr", "primary_color": "#7C2D12", "secondary_color": "#FFF7ED", "text_color": "#111827", "table_header_bg_color": "#7C2D12", "table_header_text_color": "#FFFFFF", "border_color": "#FDBA74", "font_size": 12, "title_font_size": 24, "show_company_logo": true, "show_company_name": true, "show_report_title": true, "show_footer": true, "footer_text": "Purchase order generated by Dynamic PDF Report Builder", "show_print_date": true, "show_page_number": true, "table_border_style": "solid", "zebra_rows": true, "template_preset": false } }, "fields": [ {"sequence": 10, "field_name": "partner_id", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 20, "field_name": "date_order", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 30, "field_name": "user_id", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 40, "field_name": "amount_total", "show_label": true} ], "line_sections": [ { "sequence": 10, "name": "Purchase Lines", "one2many_field_name": "order_line", "show_section_title": true, "line_fields": [ {"sequence": 10, "field_name": "product_id", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 20, "field_name": "product_qty", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 30, "field_name": "price_unit", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 40, "field_name": "price_subtotal", "show_label": true} ] } ], "blocks": [ { "sequence": 10, "block_type": "terms_conditions", "title": "Purchase Terms", "content": "

Supplier delivery, pricing, and payment terms apply as agreed with the purchasing team.

", "position": "after_main_table", "alignment": "left", "is_active": true, "source_type": "record_name" }, { "sequence": 20, "block_type": "signature", "title": "Buyer Approval", "position": "after_line_sections", "alignment": "right", "is_active": true, "source_type": "record_name", "signature_label": "Buyer Signature", "show_signature_line": true } ], "formulas": [ { "sequence": 10, "name": "Calculated Total", "code": "calculated_total", "scope": "main_record", "formula_type": "arithmetic", "active": true, "formula_expression": "amount_untaxed + amount_tax", "output_label": "Calculated Total", "show_in_report": true, "show_in_line_tables": true } ], "groups": [ {"sequence": 10, "field_name": "user_id"} ], "aggregates": [ {"field_name": "amount_total", "aggregate_type": "sum"} ] }
Delivery reference, partner, schedule, state, and stock move quantities.

{ "version": "1.0", "module": "dynamic_pdf_report_builder", "report": { "name": "Delivery Order Template", "report_title": "Delivery Order", "model": "stock.picking", "styling": { "layout_style": "modern", "paper_size": "a4", "direction": "ltr", "primary_color": "#4338CA", "secondary_color": "#EEF2FF", "text_color": "#111827", "table_header_bg_color": "#4338CA", "table_header_text_color": "#FFFFFF", "border_color": "#C7D2FE", "font_size": 12, "title_font_size": 24, "show_company_logo": true, "show_company_name": true, "show_report_title": true, "show_footer": true, "footer_text": "Delivery order generated by Dynamic PDF Report Builder", "show_print_date": true, "show_page_number": true, "table_border_style": "light", "zebra_rows": true, "template_preset": false } }, "fields": [ {"sequence": 10, "field_name": "name", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 20, "field_name": "partner_id", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 30, "field_name": "scheduled_date", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 40, "field_name": "state", "show_label": true} ], "line_sections": [ { "sequence": 10, "name": "Operations", "one2many_field_name": "move_ids", "show_section_title": true, "line_fields": [ {"sequence": 10, "field_name": "product_id", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 20, "field_name": "quantity", "show_label": true} ] } ], "blocks": [ { "sequence": 10, "block_type": "barcode", "title": "Delivery Barcode", "position": "after_main_table", "alignment": "right", "is_active": true, "source_type": "record_name", "size": 140 }, { "sequence": 20, "block_type": "signature", "title": "Receipt", "position": "after_line_sections", "alignment": "right", "is_active": true, "source_type": "record_name", "signature_label": "Received By", "show_signature_line": true } ], "formulas": [], "groups": [ {"sequence": 10, "field_name": "state"} ], "aggregates": [ {"field_name": "name", "aggregate_type": "count"} ] }
Compact employee identity and work contact profile.

{ "version": "1.0", "module": "dynamic_pdf_report_builder", "report": { "name": "Employee Card", "report_title": "Employee Card", "model": "hr.employee", "styling": { "layout_style": "minimal", "paper_size": "a5", "direction": "ltr", "primary_color": "#111827", "secondary_color": "#F9FAFB", "text_color": "#111827", "table_header_bg_color": "#111827", "table_header_text_color": "#FFFFFF", "border_color": "#D1D5DB", "font_size": 11, "title_font_size": 20, "show_company_logo": true, "show_company_name": true, "show_report_title": true, "show_footer": true, "footer_text": "Employee card generated by Dynamic PDF Report Builder", "show_print_date": true, "show_page_number": false, "table_border_style": "light", "zebra_rows": false, "template_preset": false } }, "fields": [ {"sequence": 10, "field_name": "name", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 20, "field_name": "job_id", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 30, "field_name": "department_id", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 40, "field_name": "work_email", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 50, "field_name": "work_phone", "show_label": true} ], "line_sections": [], "blocks": [ { "sequence": 10, "block_type": "qr_code", "title": "Employee QR", "position": "after_main_table", "alignment": "center", "is_active": true, "source_type": "record_name", "size": 100 } ], "formulas": [ { "sequence": 10, "name": "Work Contact", "code": "work_contact", "scope": "main_record", "formula_type": "concat", "active": true, "formula_expression": "work_email work_phone", "separator": " | ", "output_label": "Work Contact", "show_in_report": true, "show_in_line_tables": true } ], "groups": [ {"sequence": 10, "field_name": "department_id"} ], "aggregates": [ {"field_name": "name", "aggregate_type": "count"} ] }
Product template prices, category, internal reference, and cost.

{ "version": "1.0", "module": "dynamic_pdf_report_builder", "report": { "name": "Product Price List", "report_title": "Product Price List", "model": "product.template", "styling": { "layout_style": "modern", "paper_size": "a4", "direction": "ltr", "primary_color": "#334155", "secondary_color": "#F8FAFC", "text_color": "#111827", "table_header_bg_color": "#334155", "table_header_text_color": "#FFFFFF", "border_color": "#CBD5E1", "font_size": 11, "title_font_size": 22, "show_company_logo": true, "show_company_name": true, "show_report_title": true, "show_footer": true, "footer_text": "Price list generated by Dynamic PDF Report Builder", "show_print_date": true, "show_page_number": true, "table_border_style": "light", "zebra_rows": true, "template_preset": false } }, "fields": [ {"sequence": 10, "field_name": "name", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 20, "field_name": "default_code", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 30, "field_name": "categ_id", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 40, "field_name": "list_price", "show_label": true}, {"sequence": 50, "field_name": "standard_price", "show_label": true} ], "line_sections": [], "blocks": [ { "sequence": 10, "block_type": "note", "title": "Price List Note", "content": "

Review price and cost values before sharing externally.

", "position": "after_main_table", "alignment": "left", "is_active": true, "source_type": "record_name" } ], "formulas": [ { "sequence": 10, "name": "Margin Amount", "code": "margin_amount", "scope": "main_record", "formula_type": "arithmetic", "active": true, "formula_expression": "list_price - standard_price", "output_label": "Margin", "show_in_report": true, "show_in_line_tables": true } ], "groups": [ {"sequence": 10, "field_name": "categ_id"} ], "aggregates": [ {"field_name": "list_price", "aggregate_type": "avg"} ] }
